name: Outrageously Oatmeal Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring all ingredients to room temperature.
2. Pour the mixture into a baking dish in order.
3. Set the oven to 375°F (190°C) and bake for white bread.
4. Add oats after the first knead or at the beep on the fruit and nut cycle for added texture.
5. Sprinkle a few oats on top of the loaf before serving.
